## Emitters type

Type safe emitters dictionary, where each key is the [XEvent](./x-components.xevent.md) name, and the value is a [https://rxjs.dev/api/index/class/Subject](https://rxjs.dev/api/index/class/Subject) of the [XEventPayload](./x-components.xeventpayload.md) type.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type Emitters = {
    [Event in XEvent]?: Emitter<Event>;
};
```
<b>References:</b> [XEvent](./x-components.xevent.md)<!-- -->, [Emitter](./x-components.emitter.md)
